name: RMW - M249
author: Mr. Rubyyy
description: Rubyyy's Modular Weaponry - M249 is the Army Designation for the FN Minimi with a swapped out heatshield. It has served the US army well for three decades so far. Lovely light machinegun sharing ammunition with the M4, the ol' 5.56 Nato. >CONTROLS< : [MMB-Fire Selector] [RMB-Aim Down Sight] [R-Reload] [T-Attachment Menu] [SHIFT-Canting/Sprint]
